# Sigla

> The human review layer for AI-generated Markdown.

Sigla is a proprietary macOS desktop application for reading, annotating, and reviewing Markdown generated by Codex and other Agents. It turns long documents into evidence-linked insights, anchors annotations to exact source passages, and converts selected review notes into structured feedback for an Agent.

## Canonical pages

- Product page: https://z18520736823-coder.github.io/sigla-desktop/
- Chinese product page: https://z18520736823-coder.github.io/sigla-desktop/zh/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/z18520736823-coder/sigla-desktop
- Public Preview download: https://github.com/z18520736823-coder/sigla-desktop/releases/tag/v1.0.0-preview.1
- Privacy: https://github.com/z18520736823-coder/sigla-desktop/blob/main/legal/PRIVACY.md
- Security: https://github.com/z18520736823-coder/sigla-desktop/blob/main/SECURITY.md

## Verified product facts

- Platform: macOS 11 or later, Universal 2 for Apple Silicon and Intel.
- AI providers: OpenAI and DeepSeek through bring-your-own API key.
- AI is optional and initiated by the user.
- Reading, rendering, annotation, monitoring, and local basic feedback work without an API key or network connection.
- Source Markdown is handled through a strict read-only workflow.
- Sigla exposes no source operation for editing, deleting, moving, renaming, copying, restoring, or formatting Markdown.
- Annotations, reading state, AI cache, and feedback history are stored locally in Sigla's private application data.
- API keys are stored in macOS Keychain.
- Sigla has no account system, advertising, behavioral analytics, crash telemetry, or background cloud sync.
- The source code is private. The GitHub repository distributes product documentation and release downloads.

## Core capabilities

1. AI-powered Clarity: one central conclusion and 3–5 evidence-linked key takeaways.
2. Effortless Annotation: box annotations attached to exact source passages.
3. Agent-ready Feedback: exact locations, requested changes, and acceptance criteria for Codex or another Agent.
4. Offline Continuity: reading, annotation, and local feedback without AI connectivity.
